# CS104 — Planned CS nested in a subfolder, no Closed date (CS43 fixture f)

**Status:** planned

Planned files are ALWAYS linted regardless of date per CS43 C43-3 — the
date-gate only applies to `done_*` files. The missing agent columns must
WARN under default flags and ERROR under `--strict-agent-columns`.

## Model audit

| Reviewer model | gpt-5.5 |
